hooks.prompt: Scan this conversation for learnings worth preserving: (1) Corrections/feedback I gave you about approach, (2) Surprising gotchas or non-obvious patterns, (3) Validated decisions that worked well. For each learning, determine memory type (user/feedback/project/reference) and create/update appropriate file in ~/.claude/projects/-Users-patrykkopycinski-Projects-kibana/memory/ with proper YAML frontmatter (name, description, type). Skip if nothing memory-worthy found. Return {"systemMessage": "📝 Captured N learnings"} or {} if none.
